title: Alive
html: D C D G Bb F Every day is a new day. I'm thankful for every breath I take D C D G Bb F I won't take it for granted. So I learn from my mistake D C D G Bb It's beyond my control, some times it's best let go. Whatever happens F D C D G Bb F in this life time. So I trust in love. You have give me peace of mind Refrão: Bb D F C F I feel so alive for the very first time. I can't deny you F E D E D C I feel so alive Bb D F C F I feel so alive for the very first time. And I think I can fly D C D G Bb F D C D Sunshine upon my face. A new song for me to sing. Tell the world how I G Bb F D C D fell inside. Even thougt it might cost me everything. Now there I know G Bb F D C D this, so beyond, I can't hold this. I can never turn my back away. Now G Bb F That I've seen you. I can never look away Solo: D F E C F D C Bb Now that I know you (I could never to my back away), now that I see you C D C (I could never look away). Now that I know you (I could never to my back away). Bb C Now that I see you (I belive no matter what they say).
